languages.text: "Я заставлю вас проглотить ваши слова". {n}Себериан обнажает меч, позволяя вам встать в защитную стойку, и наносит удар — сильный, но достаточно медленный, чтобы вы могли его парировать.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Не знаю, что за безумие одолело твой разум. Но может быть демонстрация твоей неправоты вернет его на место" {n}Договорив, Себериан медленно достает меч, позволяя вам встать в защитную стойку, после чего наносит удар — сильный, но достаточно медленный, чтобы вы могли его спарировать.{/n}

languages.text: "I will make you eat your words." {n}Seberian unsheathes his sword, giving you time to assume a defensive stance, and strikes — hard, but slow enough for you to parry it.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Я заставлю вас проглотить ваши слова". {n}Себериан обнажает меч, позволяя вам встать в защитную стойку, и наносит удар — сильный, но достаточно медленный, чтобы вы могли его парировать.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "I will make you eat your words." {n}Seberian unsheathes his sword, giving you time to assume a defensive stance, and strikes — hard, but slow enough for you to parry it.{/n}
"I will make you eat your words." {n}Seberian unsheathes his sword, giving you time to assume a defensive stance, and strikes — hard, but slow enough for you to parry it.{/n}
"I will make you eat your words." {n}Seberian unsheathes his sword, giving you time to assume a defensive stance, and strikes — hard, but slow enough for you to parry it.{/n}

languages.text: “我要让你收回这句话。”{n}塞贝里安拔剑出鞘，给你时间摆出防御姿态，随后挥剑一斩——沉重而有力，但动作缓慢，足以让你挡下这一击。{/n}
languages.original_text: "I will make you eat your words." {n}Seberian unsheathes his sword, giving you time to assume a defensive stance, and strikes — hard, but slow enough for you to parry it.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “我要让你收回这句话。”{n}塞贝里安拔剑出鞘，给你时间摆出防御姿态，随后挥剑一斩——沉重而有力，但动作缓慢，足以让你挡下这一击。{/n}

languages.text: « Vous allez regretter ces paroles. » {n}Seberian dégaine son épée, vous laissant le temps d'adopter une posture défensive, puis frappe avec force, mais suffisamment lentement pour que vous puissiez parer son coup.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I will make you eat your words." {n}Seberian unsheathes his sword, giving you time to assume a defensive stance, and strikes — hard, but slow enough for you to parry it.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Vous allez regretter ces paroles. » {n}Seberian dégaine son épée, vous laissant le temps d'adopter une posture défensive, puis frappe avec force, mais suffisamment lentement pour que vous puissiez parer son coup.{/n}

languages.text: «Haré que se trague esas palabras». {n}Seberian desenvaina, dándote tiempo a asumir una postura defensiva, y golpea. Es un ataque poderoso, pero lo bastante lento como para permitirte pararlo.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I will make you eat your words." {n}Seberian unsheathes his sword, giving you time to assume a defensive stance, and strikes — hard, but slow enough for you to parry it.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Haré que se trague esas palabras». {n}Seberian desenvaina, dándote tiempo a asumir una postura defensiva, y golpea. Es un ataque poderoso, pero lo bastante lento como para permitirte pararlo.{/n}

languages.text: "Sözlerini sana yedireceğim." {n}Seberian, kılıcını kınından çıkarıp savunma pozisyonu alman için size zaman tanıyor. Sonrasında saldırıyor... Sert ama savuşturabileceğin kadar yavaş.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I will make you eat your words." {n}Seberian unsheathes his sword, giving you time to assume a defensive stance, and strikes — hard, but slow enough for you to parry it.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Sözlerini sana yedireceğim." {n}Seberian, kılıcını kınından çıkarıp savunma pozisyonu alman için size zaman tanıyor. Sonrasında saldırıyor... Sert ama savuşturabileceğin kadar yavaş.{/n}

languages.text: "Das nehmt Ihr zurück." {n}Seberian zieht sein Schwert, lässt dir Zeit, eine Abwehrhaltung einzunehmen und schlägt zu ... hart, aber langsam genug für dich, um seinen Hieb zu parieren.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I will make you eat your words." {n}Seberian unsheathes his sword, giving you time to assume a defensive stance, and strikes — hard, but slow enough for you to parry it.{/n}

languages.text: 「お前が言ったことを、お前が食べることになる」{n}シベリアは剣を抜いて、防御態勢をとる時間を与え、ゆっくりとだが力強く攻撃を仕掛ける。{/n}
